hero.title: Your Mountain Retreat Awaits
hero.description: Located in the Serra da Estrela, in the heart of Covilhã — comfortable rooms, genuine hospitality and the best of the Portuguese mountains.
booking.title: Check Availability
booking.subtitle: Fill in your details and we will confirm your reservation.
booking.name: Full Name
services.title: Everything You Need for a Perfect Stay
services.desc: From comfortable rooms to delicious meals and practical amenities — we've thought of everything so you just need to relax.
services.accommodationDesc: Clean, air-conditioned rooms designed for true rest — whether for a weekend or a longer stay.
services.breakfastDesc: Start your day with a generous table of fresh bread, pastries, regional cheeses and hot coffee.
services.wifiDesc: Stay connected throughout the hotel with free high-speed Wi-Fi in all rooms and common areas.
services.parkingDesc: Arrive worry-free with free hotel parking — no extra costs, no stress.
services.restaurantDesc: Restaurante Solneve serves comforting Portuguese meals in a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere.
services.accessibleDesc: Committed to everyone's comfort, we offer accessible rooms and facilities throughout the hotel.
gallery.title: See Where You'll Stay
whyUs.title: Much More Than a Place to Sleep
whyUs.subtitle: Hotel Solneve is not just accommodation — it's a comfortable base in the heart of one of Portugal's most beautiful mountain regions. Here's why our guests keep coming back.
whyUs.locationDesc: Steps away from the best restaurants, shops and attractions — everything within reach.
whyUs.mountainDesc: The perfect base to explore Portugal's most beautiful mountain range.
whyUs.accessibilityDesc: Only 1 km from the train station and a 10-minute walk from the University of Beira Interior.
whyUs.serviceDesc: Authentic Portuguese hospitality — a friendly team that treats every guest like family.
whyUs.roomsDesc: Clean, air-conditioned rooms with everything you need for a good night's sleep.
whyUs.valueDesc: Quality accommodation, breakfast and amenities — all at a price that makes sense.
faq.title: Most Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your stay.
faq.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a1: Check-in is from 2:00 PM and check-out is until 12:00 PM. If you need different times, please contact us in advance.
faq.q2: Is parking available at the hotel?
faq.a2: Yes, we provide free parking for all our guests, with no additional costs.
faq.q3: Is breakfast included in the room price?
faq.a3: Yes, breakfast is included in most of our rates. It includes fresh bread, pastries, regional cheeses and hot coffee.
faq.q4: How far is the hotel from Serra da Estrela?
faq.a4: We are about a 20-minute drive from Torre, the highest point of Serra da Estrela.
faq.q5: Is the hotel near public transportation?
faq.a5: Yes, just 1 km from Covilhã train station. The University of Beira Interior is a 10-minute walk away.
faq.a6: Yes, we have rooms and facilities adapted for guests with reduced mobility.
faq.q7: Can I have dinner at the hotel?
faq.a7: Restaurante Solneve serves comforting Portuguese meals in a relaxed atmosphere.
faq.q8: How can I make a reservation?
faq.a8: You can book by phone (+351 275 323 001), website or email. Booking directly guarantees the best rate.
cta.title: Your Mountain Retreat Awaits You
cta.subtitle: Book directly with us for the best rate and personalized service. We guarantee your stay in Covilhã will be unforgettable.
footer.desc: A cozy 3-star hotel at the foot of Serra da Estrela, in the heart of Covilhã, Portugal.
footer.directionsText: Located in the center of Covilhã, 1 km from the train station and a 10-minute walk from the university.
